Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents the legal billing entity (the client). A customer can have multiple facilities/companies.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer (often same as the primary user's UID or a generated ID).

name.description: Official legal name of the customer for invoicing.

billingEmail.description: Email address where invoices should be sent.

Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a physical facility or branch belonging to a Customer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Company entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who is the primary operator of this facility.

customerId.description: Identifier for the Customer (billing entity) this facility belongs to.

name.description: A user-defined name for the facility.

address.description: The physical location of the facility.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the company was created.

SubstanceInventoryItem.title: SubstanceInventoryItem
SubstanceInventoryItem.description: Represents a single chemical substance present in a specific company's inventory.

productName.description: The name of the product or substance.

sevesoCategoryIds.description: Array of Seveso category IDs the substance falls into.

arieCategoryIds.description: Array of ARIE category IDs the substance falls into.

isNamedSubstance.description: Flag indicating if it is a named substance.

namedSubstanceName.description: The name of the substance if it's a named one.

quantity.description: The quantity of the substance present, in tons.

uid.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Authentication.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

customerId.description: Identifier for grouping users into a single customer account.

customerName.description: Display name for the customer group (legal name).

definition.description: Stores public profile information for each user.
Stores facility/branch information linked to a customer.
Contains chemical substances belonging to a specific company facility.

firestore.reasoning: The structure now explicitly separates Customers (billing entities) from Companies (physical facilities). A customer can have multiple users and multiple facilities. All companies and users are grouped by customerId for billing and sharing purposes.
